nasb.text: to the south, all the land of the Canaanite, and Mearah that belongs to the Sidonians, as far as Aphek, to the border of the Amorite;

esv.text: in the south, all the land of the Canaanites, and Mearah that belongs to the Sidonians, to Aphek, to the boundary of the Amorites,

cnv.text: 他們是在南方，以及迦南人全境和屬西頓人的米亞拉，直到亞弗和亞摩利人的境界；

ccb.text: 整个迦南人的地方，从西顿人的米亚拉直到亚摩利人边境的亚弗；
